auth.title: DKV@Home Sign in
auth.description:
1) Open in your browser: {dkv_portal_url}
2) Open browser devtools (F12) -> Network.
3) After login, find the request containing "{token_endpoint_hint}".
4) Copy the full JSON response and paste it here.
5) Everything else happens automatically.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect DKV@Home
reauth_confirm.description:
Your DKV token has expired or is invalid.

1) Open in your browser: {dkv_portal_url}
2) Open browser devtools (F12) -> Network.
3) After login, find the request containing "{token_endpoint_hint}".
4) Copy the full JSON response and paste it here.

error.cannot_connect: Token is invalid or expired. Please paste a fresh token JSON.
error.invalid_token_json: No valid token JSON detected. Paste the full JSON response from the token request.
error.unknown: Unknown error. Check the HA logs for details.
